# getLatestAuctionInfo

Returns the current auction state including all validator bids and delegations.

## Import

```ts
import { RpcClient, HttpHandler } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Usage

```ts
const result = await rpcClient.getLatestAuctionInfo();

const bids = result.auctionState.getBids();
for (const bid of bids) {
  console.log('Validator:', bid.publicKey.toHex());
  console.log('Stake:', bid.bid.stakedAmount);
}
```

## Return Value

`Promise<StateGetAuctionInfoResult>`

```ts
interface StateGetAuctionInfoResult {
  auctionState: AuctionState;
}
```

## AuctionState Methods

| Method | Return Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `getBids()` | `ValidatorBid[]` | All validator bids |
| `getEraValidators()` | `EraValidators[]` | Validators per era |
